title: Icons Removed ADS
description: Removes the annoying logo from Icons resourcepack
body:
[![IAR Header Image](https://i.imgur.com/sa0iFlA.png)](https:/modrinth.com/frog) ### Maintain your immersion when using Icons! If the menu logo is annoying or breaking your immersion, you should definitely try this addon. [![chat with me on discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/compact/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/9QzHkQx) [![https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgistcdn.githack.com%2FZartrix%2F84d5a34dd0fc834c2794a3d46282114a%2Fraw%2F17b09b8bfbc667ea19b84ccd73690f104cb7e06c%2Ficon.svg&n=-1](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgistcdn.githack.com%2FZartrix%2F84d5a34dd0fc834c2794a3d46282114a%2Fraw%2F17b09b8bfbc667ea19b84ccd73690f104cb7e06c%2Ficon.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) [![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-advertisement-removal) [![Paypal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4562e34367c32ad1270cd194a8d359e172da4b6.png)](https://paypal.com/paypalme/pootsccm/) [![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1d541c1ad59ce1e90ed7947fe6a614a9b38c04c.png)](https://ko-fi.com/berniestorystudio/) [![website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6de5d57dff6149b66f5a6bcace8d20faf7b01296.png)](https://noicons.drr.ac/) # 💚 License We are using the ARR license ## 🖌 Customisable The pack is customisable for private usage. ## 💶 Donate Feel free to support us!
